claims.statement: On this machine and one-million-cell numeric DEFLATE level 6 workload, 1,000-cell targeted upsert used one source-order scan, matched 500 existing cells, inserted 500 cells, and staged 34897577 output bytes.

Targeted upsert median total/mutation/single-pass-transform time was 3821/2327/2132 ms with 8.55078 MB peak working set, versus the same-protocol historical total/mutation baseline of 4353/2968 ms; total and mutation decreased by about 12.2% and 21.6% on this workload.
Targeted replace median total/mutation/save time was 1844/596/1249 ms with 8.41406 MB peak working set; targeted replace and upsert still rewrite and recompress the complete worksheet part.
No-op copy median total/save time was 1431/1424 ms with 6.97266 MB peak working set. Copy-original means logical payload and CRC preservation and does not claim raw compressed-byte passthrough.
